name: ai_autopilot
description: MusePilot is an AI-powered auto-queue plugin for Volumio. It picks the next track from TIDAL/Qobuz based on your taste using your own LLM key, Ollama, Last.fm, Spotify, or a local model.

scripts.test: node test/qobuz-request.test.js && node test/download-state.test.js && node test/qobuz-metadata-cache.test.js

author: Daeyeol <samadhy81@gmail.com>

volumio_info.details: MusePilot auto-queues the next track based on your listening history. Works with installed TIDAL and Qobuz plugins as the music source. Supports user-provided LLM keys, Ollama, Last.fm, Spotify, or a local recommender.
volumio_info.changelog: MusePilot rename, Qobuz local cache, cached-file playback controls, public feedback links, and Qobuz cache tests.
